title: Donate
content:
# Donate

**Rock Sponsorship - $500**

[See this page for more info and ordering.](/index.php/about/donate/2-uncategorised/478-rock-sponsorship-program)

See below if you prefer to mail a check and save us the PayPal fees. If you've mailed a check, please e-mail [contact email].

![engravedrock](/images/photos_building/engravedrock.JPG)

**Angel Pin Donor - $100+** \- Receive an exclusive Angel Donor pin.

![](https://www.paypalobjects.com/en_US/i/scr/pixel.gif) 

![angelPin](/images/photos_building/angelPin.jpg)

**Or Donate any amount you'd like via PayPal:**

**You may also mail a check for any amount to:**

Triangle Curling Club  
P.O. Box 14628  
Durham, NC 27709

The Triangle Curling Club is a certified 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, and donations to the club are tax-deductible.  
  
Thank you for supporting curling in North Carolina!

#### Questions

[contact email] or [contact email]
